structural_reviews.screaming: qa/rows/screaming-review.json: pass; 8 of 8 frames, no errors or warnings.
structural_reviews.grooming: qa/rows/grooming-review.json: pass; 8 of 8 frames, no errors or warnings.

screaming.motion: A coherent seated closed-mouth to open-mouth yowl and recovery loop; the mouth remains attached to the face, with no detached effects.
screaming.identity: Lean adult Ajman remains black-faced through muzzle and chin, with front-only under-chin/chest white, an intact long anatomical-left foreleg stripe, black opposite foreleg apart from its paw, and the same modest ear tip.
screaming.registration: No visible clipping, overlap, baseline jump, or material size pop.

grooming.motion: A coherent reset, raised left-paw lick, face rub, lower, and reset loop; the tongue and paw stay attached.
grooming.identity: The raised grooming paw is Ajman's anatomical left foreleg and retains the long white stripe; the opposite foreleg stays black except for the paw. Face, front-only under-chin white, chest/belly white, and same modest ear tip are consistent.
grooming.registration: No visible clipping, overlap, baseline jump, or material size pop.

transparency.evidence: All 16 final PNGs are 192 by 208 and report alpha support; the visible sprite field outside each silhouette is transparent.
